title: leucanthemum montanum
intro: Leucanthemum montanum, also known as the Edelweiss or Alpine Daisy, is a perennial alpine plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and inflammation due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Leucanthemum montanum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum montanum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, salves, or topical creams for various health applications.
